description: A life insurance policyholder has lost their physical policy contract and requests a duplicate copy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Generate a duplicate copy of the original policy contract.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the duplicate document.

nodes.task_description: Mail the duplicate policy to the customer's address on file.

expected_outcome.value: Agent processes the mailing of the physical document.
